_comment: QA Rules for BedaBeda Growth Site. Read by the run-qa-loop skill to drive Midscene semantic assertions and Playwright VRT checks.

project.name: BedaBeda Growth Site
project.brand: Premium, High-Growth — modern, clean, and premium with bold contrast

semantic_rules.description: The main H1 headline is prominent, easily readable, and has high contrast against its background.
No images appear broken, and all placeholders or generic boxes are fully loaded.
The sticky header/navigation is clearly visible at the top of the viewport.
Overall spacing and padding look consistent and premium, without bleeding or overlapping elements.
Primary call-to-action buttons have high contrast text and are clearly distinguishable from the background.
On mobile viewport, no horizontal scrollbar appears and content does not overflow the screen edge.
The page footer is fully rendered with visible links and no clipped content.
